sentences.english: Describe an important memory from your childhood.
Explain why it is important to you.
One of my most important childhood memories is winning first place in a school drawing contest when I was nine.
sentences.korean: 가장 중요한 어린 시절 기억 중 하나는 9살 때 학교 그리기 대회에서 1등을 한 거예요.

sentences.english: I remember being very nervous because there were over a hundred students competing.
sentences.korean: 100명 넘는 학생이 참가해서 매우 긴장했던 걸 기억해요.

sentences.english: When the teacher called my name as the winner I couldn't believe it.
sentences.korean: 선생님이 우승자로 내 이름을 불렀을 때 믿을 수가 없었어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Working from Home Pros and Cons

sentences.english: This memory is important because it taught me that hard work pays off.
sentences.korean: 이 기억이 중요한 이유는 노력은 보상을 받는다는 것을 가르쳐줬기 때문이에요.

sentences.english: I had practiced drawing every day for months before the contest.
sentences.korean: 대회 전 몇 달간 매일 그림 연습을 했었어요.

sentences.english: That experience gave me confidence that I could achieve things if I put in the effort.
sentences.korean: 그 경험이 노력하면 무언가를 이룰 수 있다는 자신감을 줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
